positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a cosmic creature or celestial guardian floating among nebula clouds. The creature should have sleek, flowing lines and bioluminescent elements, suggesting a blend of mythology and deep space biology. The overall aesthetic is highly graphic and clean, utilizing strong silhouettes against a dark, deep-space background. The color palette should be restricted to electric blues, vibrant violets, deep indigo, and hints of glowing cyan, emphasizing contrast and depth. Composition must be centered and symmetrical, designed to look excellent as a repeat pattern or single, impactful graphic print on apparel. Vector art style, highly detailed yet simple shapes, perfect for screen printing. Studio lighting setup, ultra sharp focus, high contrast, cosmic art, vaporwave influence.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, low quality, disfigured, signature, grain, photo, photorealism, messy, busy, complex
